The easiest ways to reach me and get context on the work.

This page is the quickest way to understand where I’m based, what kind of work this portfolio represents, and where to find the full profile.

Current profile

Backend, platform, and technical-leadership work where architecture and execution both matter.

I do my best work in environments where architecture, execution, and team effectiveness all need to improve together, not in isolation.

LinkedIn GitHub Resume Website

Location

San Jose, CA

Based in the Bay Area and working across backend, platform, and engineering-leadership scope.

Focus

The work here is strongest in backend, platform, engineering manager, and technical-lead contexts where system design, team growth, and execution quality all matter.

Snapshot

I am usually at my best when architecture, delivery, and team health are all under pressure at the same time. That is where technical judgment and leadership stop being separate skills and start reinforcing each other.

Preferences

This portfolio stores a small local preference so the cookie controls feel integrated instead of outsourced.
